title: AvM Staff data pac
description: A data pack that adds a powerful staff with multiple magical abilities and custom effects
body:
Hello! Looking for an interesting AvM project? Well, you’ve found it!

Created entirely from scratch by me, this datapack adds the staff that belonged to the Orange King.

For now, it can hold only two blocks — a command block and the game icon block.

This limitation is due to quality and stability reasons.


Almost all visual features of the command staff have been faithfully recreated in the datapack — every command is accompanied by floating text above, just like in the animations.

The staff is also very convenient, featuring many useful abilities.


Staff abilities:




1) Fireball — creates a fireball 3 blocks away in the direction you’re looking, which flies straight forward. (Each fireball created by the staff has built-in anti-lag: it disappears after 1 minute.)
2) Flight — allows you to glide just like Yellow did in the animations.
3) TP — teleports you to the spot you’re looking at.
4) Lightning — summons lightning 10 blocks away in the direction you’re looking. Be careful with it!
5) Mob without AI — look at the selected entity, then remove its AI.
6) Mob with AI — want to return the mob’s intelligence? Do the same as in ability 5, but with this one — it restores the entity’s mind.
7) Kill — kills the entity you’re looking at.
8) Clear Effects — removes all effects from you, including positive ones.
9) Knockback — pushes entities backward based on their facing direction: if an entity looks at you, it’ll be pushed straight back by 6 blocks.
10) Setblock Obsidian — creates obsidian 3 blocks away in the direction you’re looking.
11) Setblock Iron — creates an iron block 3 blocks away in the direction you’re looking.
12) Setblock Stone — creates stone next to the block you’re looking at.
13) Remove Block — deletes the block you’re looking at.
14) TNT — creates TNT that flies forward in the direction of your view.Item Giving — allows you to give yourself any block or item in the game, with custom quantity and type settings.
15) tem Giving — allows you to give yourself any block or item in the game, with custom quantity and type settings.



version - 1.21.9 - 1.21.8
optifine or other mods - not required
